text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower, the Japanese confectionery you
gave me yesterday had an excellent flavor as
always.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh, really? That makes me so happy!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: You are happy? But I was the recipient.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Well, yes. But I never really get to speak to
anyone about Japanese treats... so I enjoy getting
to talk about them with you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Ah, but if I keep recommending so many to you,
it might be bad for your health...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Not at all. I can simply expend any excess calories
I consume by exercising afterward.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
My current body weight is within optimal range.
There is no cause for distress.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Th-that's good, then. So, um, if you really don't
mind...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Would you like to share some of the new sweets I
just bought?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Affirmative. Let us initiate the protocol for
Operation: Sweets.
